videos.title: “Either you were conned or your staff must be stupid” – Upin Ipin creator on theme park deal
videos.summary: This interview with Hj Burhanuddin Md Radzi, the mastermind behind Malaysia's hit animation Upin & Ipin, offers an inspiring look into transitioning from a corporate oil-and-gas career to building a highly successful creative empire. Viewers will gain valuable business insights into leveraging intellectual property (IP), navigating market challenges, and scaling a local brand into a household name across Southeast Asia.

timestamps.topic: Transitioning from Oil and Gas to Animation
How Upin & Ipin Were Created
Emulating Disney's IP Business Model

videos.title: How one financial choice can reshape a bloodline | Reni Eniola | TEDxMississauga
videos.summary: This inspiring TEDx talk explores how a single parent's decision to break the silence around money can fundamentally alter a family's financial destiny across generations. Through her personal journey of buying a home at 23, the speaker illustrates how teaching practical financial habits to children early on creates a compounding 'ripple effect' of wealth and confidence. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to overcome generational financial anxiety and empower the next generation with the gift of financial literacy.

timestamps.topic: Breaking the silence on generational money fears
How small financial habits compound over time
Redefining financial literacy as opportunity and choice

videos.title: Why Building a Business Is Quietly Destroying Your Iman as a Muslim Man
videos.summary: This video is a powerful wake-up call for high-performing Muslim professionals who struggle to balance business success with spiritual devotion. Abdullah Oduro explains how neglecting or rushing Salah (prayer) slowly erodes one's spiritual health and family relationships, offering a roadmap to reconnect with Allah. By prioritizing prayer times and cultivating mindfulness (Khushū'), professionals can build a stronger foundation for both worldly and ultimate success.

timestamps.topic: Prioritizing Prescribed Prayer Times over Business Meetings
Finding Spiritual Nourishment and Focus in Prayer
The Danger of Rushed Prayers and Heart Hardening

videos.title: What Senior Engineers do Differently (Vercel VP)
videos.summary: Gain insider knowledge from the VP of Vercel on the exact habits, communication strategies, and technical decision-making skills that distinguish senior engineers. It’s the ultimate roadmap for a junior fullstack developer aiming to accelerate their career and understand how software is scaled globally.

videos.title: EP205 | PRN Johor 2026: Post-Match Analysis
videos.summary: To thrive as a professional in Malaysia, you must understand the policy and economic landscape. This post-match analysis of the Johor state election breaks down the changing socio-political climate, preparing you to anticipate economic trends and structural shifts in the country.

videos.title: You Didn't Ship a Bug. You Just Wrote It for a Human. - Ravi Madabhushi, Scalekit
videos.summary: As AI agents increasingly interact with our APIs, traditional security architectures built for human users are showing serious cracks. This video explains why treating AI agents like standard users or broad service accounts leads to dangerous security loopholes and database strains. The core takeaway is a blueprint for building robust, first-class "on-behalf-of" authentication layers tailored specifically for non-deterministic AI workflows.

timestamps.topic: The flaw of forcing AI agents into human or service account roles
How non-deterministic AI agents break traditional authorization
Designing a first-class 'on-behalf-of' security layer for AI

videos.title: Get started with the Interactions API
videos.summary: Discover how Google's newly available Interactions API simplifies AI development by providing a single, unified interface for all Gemini models and agents. This video walks you through the API's powerful features—including stateful memory and multi-modal capabilities—by building a smart photo editor from scratch. It is a must-watch for developers wanting to streamline their workflow and build highly context-aware, interactive AI applications.

timestamps.topic: Introducing the Interactions API and Key Features
Building a Photo Editor App Using the API
Stateful Image Editing Demonstration

videos.title: [S01:E17] Dipaksa buat personal loan, akhirnya tanggung hutang seorang diri.
videos.summary: This video is a highly engaging and practical guide for young graduates and first-time homebuyers looking to step into the Malaysian property market. Featuring property and financial experts, it outlines the critical steps needed to prepare a solid financial profile, set realistic budgets, and make informed decisions. Watching this will equip you with the essential checklists to avoid common homebuying traps and set yourself up for long-term financial security.

timestamps.topic: Introducing the first-home purchase checklist for young graduates
Understanding and preparing your financial profile and budget

videos.title: Ask Allah To Change YOU Instead | LATEST Khutbah by Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: In this inspiring sermon, Dr. Omar Suleiman calls for a profound paradigm shift in our supplications, urging believers to focus on asking Allah to change their inner hearts rather than just their outer circumstances. By highlighting powerful prophetic prayers, he demonstrates how true contentment is achieved when we align our personal desires with the Divine will. This video is a must-watch for anyone seeking to elevate their spiritual practice and find genuine peace in life's ups and downs.

timestamps.topic: The Difference Between Asking for Firmness and Asking for Divine Direction
A Prophetic Dua for Aligning Your Desires with Allah's Will

videos.title: WTF Is the Context Layer? The Missing Infrastructure for Production Agents — Prukalpa Sankar
videos.summary: This video explores the concept of the 'context layer' in AI, explaining why cognitive intelligence alone doesn't guarantee real-world effectiveness and how businesses can help AI build crucial context. By tracing the journey of a data analyst, the speaker highlights the importance of knowledge, expertise, and norms in decision-making, offering valuable insights into engineering the future of AI. It's a must-watch for anyone looking to understand how to make AI systems more useful, secure, and sustainable in enterprise environments.

timestamps.topic: Why AI models are getting smarter but not more useful
The formula for real-world performance: Intelligence vs. Context
How humans use knowledge, expertise, and norms to solve problems

videos.title: Don't Ship Skills Without Evals — Philipp Schmid, Google DeepMind
videos.summary: This video is a must-watch for AI developers and engineers looking to build highly reliable agent capabilities without falling into the trap of untested 'skills'. The speaker, Philipp Schmid, a Staff Engineer at Google DeepMind, reveals why 'vibe checks' fail in production and provides actionable best practices for creating, testing, and evaluating AI skills. The core takeaway is that developers must implement structured evals and ablation testing to ensure their agents actually improve performance rather than quietly corrupting outputs.

timestamps.topic: Agents We Use vs. Agents We Build: The Reliability Gap
Capability vs. Preference Skills & Knowing When to Retire Them
Why Self-Generated and Bloated Skills Fail

videos.title: Forward Deployed Engineering at Cursor — Pauline Brunet
videos.summary: This talk by Pauline Brunet, Head of Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) at Cursor, provides a masterful blueprint for scaling enterprise AI deployments through specialized engineering. It is a must-watch for tech leaders looking to bridge the gap between complex AI products and real-world business value, demonstrating how to align custom engineering with client maturity to maximize return on investment.

timestamps.topic: Determining FDE fit based on client digital maturity and product customization
Anatomy of a Forward Deployed Engineer: technical depth meets high EQ
How Cursor structures project-based, high-impact FDE engagements

videos.title: A hostage negotiator's guide to being conflict-ready | Ryan Dunlap | TEDxPortland
videos.summary: This engaging talk by former hostage negotiator Ryan Dunlap challenges the common notion of "healthy conflict," arguing instead that conflict is a neutral mirror reflecting the health of the individuals involved. Dunlap shares practical lessons from law enforcement and personal life to help viewers build their capacity to navigate pressure and resolve conflicts effectively. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to improve their communication skills and emotional resilience in difficult conversations.

timestamps.topic: Conflict is a Neutral Mirror
Negotiation at Work vs. at Home
Three Lessons Learned for Conflict Capacity

videos.title: AI is shaping war—what about peace? | Branka Panic | TEDxCalle Aldama
videos.summary: This thought-provoking TEDx talk by Branka Panic explores the dual nature of artificial intelligence in global conflicts, shifting the focus from fear of rogue machines to the human decisions behind them. By sharing compelling real-world examples, she demonstrates how AI can either be weaponized to accelerate devastation or utilized by peacebuilders to prevent violence, document war crimes, and foster reconciliation. It is an essential watch for anyone interested in how we can actively steer emerging technology to protect human rights and build a more peaceful future.

timestamps.topic: How AI is currently weaponized in conflict and why it is fundamentally a human problem
Branka's personal story of growing up amidst war in the Balkans and becoming a peacebuilder
The potential for AI to act as an ally for peace and human rights documentation
How AI is facilitating anonymous dialogues and inclusive peace processes in conflict zones

videos.title: What’s going wrong with this Kotlin code?
videos.summary: This quick Kotlin developer challenge presents a real-world coding puzzle: despite two strings looking identical and matching in logs, a duplicate check fails, letting duplicate requests through. Watch as the presenter explains the code setup and challenges viewers to identify the subtle bug in the comments.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to the Kotlin duplicate ID challenge
Reviewing the code and identifying the failing check
